subject: [PATCH v5 3/5] sunrpc: guarantee a thread per pool when auto-distributing

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch ensures that when distributing threads across multiple pools in the sunrpc service, no pool is left empty even if the total number of threads requested is less than the number of pools. This is achieved by guaranteeing at least one thread per pool, which may result in a total number of threads exceeding the requested count. The change only affects the auto-distribution path and does not impact explicit per-pool thread counts set via svc_set_pool_threads().
